title: Canify
description: A small mod that adds soda cans and marshmallows to the game
body:
A small mod that adds soda cans and marshmallows to the game.

The cans are all craftable and can be filled to obtain filled versions that grant unique effects.

![An image showing all the empty can colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3acc8dc1523e498b5f6452186c51537570c3de4_0.webp)

This mod is the first one fully made by me, so I really hope you like it.
it was created as a hobby, so do not expect much updates other than when I want to.
